name: Almond Crumb Chicken
recipeIngredient: 8 oz Chicken cutlets, divided in half
recipeInstructions:
1. Pound each chicken cutlet to a thickness of 1/8 inch.
2. On a sheet of wax paper, combine ground almonds, bread crumbs, grated Parmesan cheese, salt, and basil leaves.
3. Dip one chicken cutlet into milk, then coat both sides evenly with the crumb mixture. Repeat with the remaining cutlets, using all the milk and crumb mixture.
4. Heat oil in a skillet over medium heat.
5. Add the coated chicken to the hot oil and cook for 3 to 4 minutes on each side, turning once to ensure even browning.
6. Serve with lemon wedges.
Per serving (each cutlet): 289 cal.; 16 g. fat; 67 mg. cholesterol. WW: 3 Pro; 1 1/2 fat; 110 cal.
